offer: For property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate payroll and tax documents cause cash flow gaps. We automate document generation instead of manual data entry into spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate payroll and tax documents due to manual data entry from hotel bookings.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry and template generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
